summary: Frontend testing of Display Layout tab enhancements - Compass Rose toggle, Next Stop toggle, and UI element resize/scale system. All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Display tab now shows 20/20 elements (was 18), includes new Compass Rose and Next Stop toggles
VERIFIED: data-testid='hud-toggle-showCompassRose' exists and toggles correctly, persists to localStorage
VERIFIED: data-testid='hud-toggle-showNextStop' exists in Display tab
VERIFIED: Scale system with XS=70%, S=85%, M=100%, L=115%, XL=130% working correctly
VERIFIED: 10 resizable elements have scale buttons: Turn Instructions, Speed Display, Arrival Bar, Maneuver Preview, Compass Rose, Next Stop, Fuel Cost, HOS Status, Map Controls, Route Comparison
VERIFIED: Scale persistence to localStorage under 'nav_hud_scales' key - tested XL (1.3) for navigationHUD
VERIFIED: Show All button restores all 20 elements to visible
VERIFIED: Hide All button hides all 20 elements (0/20 visible)
VERIFIED: Reset button resets scales to default (M=1.0), positions, and layout
VERIFIED: Scale buttons only appear when element is visible (hidden when toggled off)
VERIFIED: 'X resized' counter appears in stats row when scales differ from default
VERIFIED: HudLayoutView.tsx properly implements ScalePicker component with XS/S/M/L/XL buttons
VERIFIED: hudLayout.ts exports DEFAULT_SCALES, SCALE_OPTIONS, loadHudScales, saveHudScales
VERIFIED: types.ts HudLayoutConfig includes showCompassRose and showNextStop boolean fields

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Display Layout tab enhancements verified. Key points: 1) 20 total HUD elements now (was 18), includes Compass Rose and Next Stop. 2) Scale system uses XS=0.7, S=0.85, M=1.0, L=1.15, XL=1.3 multipliers. 3) Scale buttons only show for resizable elements when visible. 4) All state persists to localStorage: nav_hud_layout, nav_hud_scales, nav_hud_positions, nav_hud_order. Test flow: Guest Login -> Display (sidebar) -> Verify 20/20 visible -> Test scale buttons -> Test Show All/Hide All/Reset.

display_tab_element_count.details: Display tab shows 20/20 visible elements (was 18 before). New elements: Compass Rose, Next Stop

compass_rose_toggle.details: data-testid='hud-toggle-showCompassRose' exists, toggles correctly, persists showCompassRose:false to localStorage

next_stop_toggle.details: data-testid='hud-toggle-showNextStop' exists in Display tab Navigation category

scale_buttons.details: 10 scale-M buttons found (one per resizable element). XS/S/M/L/XL buttons work correctly

scale_persistence.details: Clicking XL on Turn Instructions saves navigationHUD:1.3 to localStorage nav_hud_scales

show_all_button.details: Show All button restores all 20 elements to visible state

hide_all_button.details: Hide All button hides all elements, counter shows 0/20 visible

reset_button.details: Reset button restores all scales to 1.0 (M), all elements visible, positions to default

scale_buttons_visibility.details: Scale buttons only appear when element is visible (hidden when element toggled off)

resized_counter.details: '1 resized' counter appears in stats row when scale differs from default
